  • Open

    McDonald's Offers $5 McGriddles Extra Value Meal and $8 Chicken McNuggets Extra Value Meal
    McDonald's introduces two limited-time Extra Value Meal offers this month: the $5 Sausage, Egg & Cheese McGriddles Extra Value Meal and the $8 10-piece Chicken McNuggets Extra Value Meal. The $5 Sausage, Egg & Cheese McGriddles Extra Value Meal includes the sandwich, hash browns, and a small coffee. The $8 10-piece Chicken McNuggets Extra Value Meal includes 10 Chicken McNuggets, medium fries, and a medium fountain drink. McDonald's previous Extra Value Meal deals were the $5 Sausage McMuffin with Egg Extra Value Meal and the $8 Big Mac Extra Value Meal. Prices vary, but those meals are now $7.79 and $10.29, respectively, at my local McDonald's here in Los Angeles. The $8 Chicken McNuggets Extra Value Meal costs $9 here, while the $5 Sausage, Egg & Cheese McGriddles Extra Value Meal is $6. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    Cajun Deep Fried Turkey is Back at Select KFC Locations in California and Washington
    Cajun Deep Fried Turkey is back for the 2025 Thanksgiving season at select KFC locations in Northern California and Washington. Priced at $79.99, the turkey is a whole bird described as "tender, juicy, and deliciously prepared in our classic KFC style." The turkey is fully cooked but must be reheated. It is not available for online ordering or delivery (i.e., you have to either call or order in person). KFC's Cajun Deep Fried Turkey is also available in a Holiday Meal and a Holiday Feast. The Holiday Meal costs $109.99 and includes: A Cajun Deep Fried Turkey Family Size Mashed Potatoes Family Size Gravy Family Size Coleslaw 12 Biscuits The Holiday Feast costs $119.99 and includes:  A Cajun Deep Fried Turkey Family Size Mashed Potatoes Family Size Gravy Family Size Mac & Cheese Family Size Sweet Corn 12 Biscuits A Family Size Cake (Lemon or Chocolate) Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    Taco Bell Tests $3 Chicken Queso Burrito
    Taco Bell is testing a new value item, the $3 Chicken Queso Burrito, for a limited time at participating locations in the Indianapolis area. The new Chicken Queso Burrito features grilled white-meat chicken, seasoned rice, green chile queso, a three-cheese blend, and pico de gallo, wrapped in a flour tortilla and grilled. The queso is also available with crispy tortilla chips for $2. The pairing is called "Chips N Queso." Taco Bell previously offered a limited-time green chile queso in March of this year as a dipping sauce for Crunchwrap Sliders. Taco Bell continues to test its Luxe Value Menu in the area, although the lineup no longer includes churros. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    Baskin-Robbins Puts Together New Dubai Chocolate Collection
    Baskin-Robbins embraces the viral Dubai chocolate trend with the launch of its new Dubai Chocolate Collection this month, featuring its November Flavor of the Month, Pistachio Chocolate Bar Ice Cream. Inspired by the combination of kadayif (finely shredded, crispy phyllo dough) and pistachio cream enrobed in chocolate, Baskin-Robbins' Dubai Chocolate includes: - Pistachio Chocolate Bar Ice Cream - A combination of pistachio and chocolate ice creams swirled with pistachio pieces and chocolate crunch ribbons. - Dubai Chocolate Sundae - Three scoops of Pistachio Chocolate Bar Ice Cream layered with hot fudge and kadayif, topped with pistachio sauce, whipped cream, a fudge drizzle, and more kadayif.  - Dubai Chocolate Shake - Pistachio Chocolate Bar Ice Cream blended with milk and pistachio sauce poured into a cup that's coated with a chocolate drizzle and topped with whipped cream, pistachio sauce, and kadayif. In addition to the new Dubai Chocolate menu, Baskin-Robbins has brought back its Turkey Cake in time for Thanksgiving. Resembling a roast turkey, the ice cream cake features an ice cream center covered in a caramel praline glaze and adorned with two sugar cone drumsticks. Through November 16, 2025, Baskin-Robbins Rewards members can get $5 off a Turkey Cake, redeemable in-shop or through the Baskin-Robbins mobile app or website. Photo via Baskin-Robbins. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Struggling with cold butter? There's a simple kitchen hack that makes mornings smoother, helping you enjoy perfect toast without the usual hassle.  ( 4 min )

    Aldi Finds for November 2025
    Discount grocery store chain Aldi has released its schedule of limited-time Aldi Finds for November 2025. This month's items see Aldi readying for the holidays with several advent calendars, snacks for entertaining, indulgent desserts, and more. Here's what this month's Aldi Finds calendar looks like: Available starting November 5, 2025: Winter Wonderland Emporium Selection Cheese Advent Calendar (pictured) - $16.99 Winter Wonderland Wine Advent Calendar - $59.99 12 Days of Beer - $19.99 Barissimo Coffee Cup Advent Calendar - $16.99 Benner Assorted Tea Advent Calendar - $7.99 Conellys 12 Days of Irish Cream - $29.99 Burman's Hot Sauce Advent Calendar - $14.99 Make It Sparkle Sparking Wine Variety Pack - $29.99 Specially Selected Imported Italian Desserts - $2.59 Specially Selected Premi…  ( 15 min )
    Shake Shack Debuts New Big Shack Burger
    Shake Shack launches a new, Big Mac-esque, deluxe version of its signature ShackBurger called the "Big Shack" as a limited-time special. Priced at $9.99, the Big Shack features two quarter-pound Angus beef patties, secret sauce, green leaf lettuce, two slices of American cheese, Roma tomatoes, thick-cut pickles, and onions, on three buttered and toasted potato buns. Key differences from the Big Mac (which costs $6.19 here in Los Angeles) include larger patties, leaf lettuce instead of shredded iceberg lettuce, fresh onion instead of dehydrated onions, the inclusion of tomatoes, and the absence of sesame seeds. I'm not a fan of the third bun on either burger, but it makes more sense when paired with bigger beef patties. Photo via Shake Shack. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    McAlister's Adds New Cuban Sandwich and Honey BBQ Pork Melt
    McAlister's Deli welcomes two new sandwiches, the Cuban Sandwich and Honey BBQ Pork Melt, as permanent additions to its menu. The Cuban Sandwich (pictured) features tangy pulled pork, Black Forest ham, Swiss cheese, yellow mustard, and pickles on a toasted baguette. A 6-inch sandwich starts at $10.89 (the price varies with location). The Honey BBQ Pork Melt consists of smoked pulled pork, honey mustard BBQ sauce, Swiss cheese, cheddar, provolone, parmesan, and tomato on toasted ciabatta. The price of the sandwich starts at $10.49 (varies with location). Photo via McAlister's Deli. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    Subway Introduces New Festive Feast Subs for Thanksgiving
    Subway adds a trio of Thanksgiving subs to the menu with the introduction of its new, limited-time Festive Feast collection. Available nationwide on November 13, 2025, the new menu items feature new cranberry sauce and new turkey stuffing made with parsley, rosemary, sage, breadcrumbs, and broth. Subway's Festive Feast collection includes the following: - TurHamKen - A much simpler twist on turducken (a chicken stuffed inside a duck stuffed inside a turkey and then roasted) that consists of roasted turkey, Black Forest ham, and rotisserie-style chicken, served with Monterey Cheddar cheese, spinach, red onions, mayo, stuffing, and cranberry sauce, on your choice of bread. - Festive Turkey - It's the same as the TurHamKen, only minus the ham and chicken. - Festive Chicken - Again, it's the same as the TurHamKen, but minus the turkey and ham. There's also an option to add cranberry sauce or stuffing to any Subway sub for an additional $1. If you're looking to save some money while trying the new subs, Subway has an online-only, buy-one-get-one-for-one-dollar deal on Footlongs exclusively for its MVP Rewards members when they use the code "FOOTLONGFAN". Photo via Subway. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    Denny's Offers Free Grand Slam to Rewards Members Through November 10, 2025
    Denny's is offering its rewards members a free Original Grand Slam redeemable from now through Monday, November 10, 2025, at participating locations nationwide. The freebie is part of a promotion that promised a free Grand Slam for the first grand slam hit during this year's World Series, i.e., you get a Grand Slam when they hit a grand slam (a home run when the bases are loaded). It can be claimed when ordering online through the Denny's website or mobile app, or by visiting a participating location and using your Denny's Rewards. Denny's Original Grand Slam is a breakfast platter that includes two buttermilk pancakes, two eggs, two strips of applewood-smoked bacon, and two pork sausage links. Photo via Denny's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    Wendy's Launches New Snickerdoodle Frosty Fusion
    Wendy's celebrates the 2025 holiday season with the launch of its new Snickerdoodle Frosty Fusion. Available for a limited time, the Snickerdoodle Frosty Fusion features a Chocolate or Vanilla Frosty blended with a cinnamon-y snickerdoodle sauce and topped with snickerdoodle cookie crumbles. It can also be ordered as a Frosty Swirl, which consists of a Chocolate or Vanilla Frosty swirled with snickerdoodle sauce. Prices vary, but at my local Wendy's here in Los Angeles, the Snickerdoodle Frosty Fusion starts at $4.19 for a small, while the Snickerdoodle Frosty Swirl costs $2.99 for a small. Photo via Wendy's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    "Chicken Sunday" Deal Back at Shake Shack Through End of 2025
    Shake Shack has brought back its Chicken Sunday deal, where you can get a free Chicken Shack sandwich with an online purchase of $10 or more on Sundays, through the end of the year. It is also offering a buy-one-get-one deal on the Smoke Shack burger throughout November. The Chicken Sundays deal can be redeemed when ordering through an in-restaurant kiosk, the Shake website, or the Shake Shack mobile app on a Sunday through December 28, 2025, using the code "CHICKENSUNDAY". The Smoke Shack November BOGO deal is also available using the same ordering options, only using the code "SMOKESHACK" instead. Shake Shack's Chicken Shack is the chain's fried chicken sandwich. It features a crispy-fried chicken breast filet, lettuce, pickles, and buttermilk herb mayo on a toasted potato bun. Prices vary, but it normally costs $9.49 here in Los Angeles. The Smoke Shack is a burger that features a quarter-pound Angus beef patty, American cheese, applewood-smoked bacon, chopped cherry peppers, and ShackSauce on a toasted potato bun. It normally costs $9.99 near me. Photo via Shake Shack. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    The North Carolina BBQ Stand Locals Call Their “Weekend Religion”
    Located at 751 State Road 1204, B’s Barbecue in Greenville, North Carolina, has achieved legendary status among barbecue enthusiasts in Eastern North Carolina. Known for its whole-hog smoking technique and minimalist setup, B’s has been attracting a devoted following since 1978. Founded by Bill McLawhorn, this iconic spot focuses on delivering slow-smoked pork and chicken, […]  ( 22 min )

    This Hidden Missouri Italian Spot Serves Spaghetti So Good It Could Be a Tradition

    In Kentucky, This Pizza Joint’s Garlic Bread Is Practically Famous
    Nestled in Lexington, Kentucky, Joe Bologna’s Restaurant & Pizzeria is not just a spot for delectable Italian-American dishes; it’s a landmark for garlic bread enthusiasts. Since opening in a historic synagogue in 1973, it has gained fame for its buttery, garlic-infused breadsticks.     This Family-Owned Ohio Café Bakes Muffins Locals Say Taste Like Home
    In Bellbrook, Ohio, The Blue Berry Café has become a haven for breakfast lovers, offering a cozy atmosphere and delightful menu that feels like a warm embrace. Known for its freshly baked muffins, the café captures the essence of home, one bite at a time. The Blueberry Classic The Blueberry Classic is a staple at […]  ( 22 min )
    The Vermont Donut Shop Locals Swear Smells Like Pure Happiness
    In a small Vermont town, North Country Donuts has become the kind of place people can’t stop talking about. The moment you walk in, the air is filled with the smell of fresh dough, sugar, and coffee — the kind of scent that instantly lifts your mood.     This Hidden Minnesota Bakery Serves Cinnamon Rolls So Big They Barely Fit The Plate

The smell of freshly baked dough and cinnamon fills the air every morning, drawing in crowds of locals, students, and tourists […]  ( 21 min )

  • Open

    2025 National Sandwich Day Deals and Specials
    Monday, November 3, 2025, is National Sandwich Day, when we celebrate various fillings between two slices of bread. Here are some deals and specials to help save some money and mark the occasion: - Capriotti's - On November 3, 2025, Capriotti's is offering its rewards members a buy-one-get-one-for-50%-off deal on all turkey subs. - Firehouse Subs - On November 3, 2025, rewards members can get a free medium Hook & Ladder, Firehouse Meatball, Turkey & Provolone, or Italian sub when they place an order of $15 or more through the Firehouse website or mobile app. - Jimmy John's - On November 3, rewards members can get a half-priced Picklewich when they order any toasted sandwich using the promo code "TOASTED". - McAlister's Deli - From November 3 through November 9, 2025, rewards members can take advantage of a buy-one-get-one-for-50%-off deal on sandwiches. - Panera - On November 3, rewards members can buy a whole sandwich and get a second one for $5 at participating locations. - Potbelly - On November 3, you can buy one Big or Original sandwich and get an Original sandwich for free using the promo code "BOGO" when ordering through the Potbelly website or mobile app. - Schlotzsky's - Through November 3, 2025, rewards members can get up to 10 medium sandwiches for $5 each using an offer in their account at participating locations. Other non-National Sandwich Day deals that can still be used to celebrate the occasion include: - Pizza Hut - There's the Melt Mondays deal, where you can get any Melt for $4.99 at participating locations.  - Subway - For a limited time, Subway rewards members can buy a Footlong sub and get a second one for $1 using the code "BOGO1". Photo via Schlotzsky's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Crumbl Debuts New Martha Stewart Menu
    Crumbl launches a new Martha Stewart-themed menu as this week's limited-time special. The menu commemorates the relaunch of Martha Stewart's first book, Entertaining. Available from November 3 through November 8, 2025, Crumbl's Martha Stewart menu includes: - New New York Cheesecake - A classic New York-style cheesecake on a graham cracker crust, topped with fresh strawberries. - New Classic Fudge Brownie - A fudge brownie topped with a chocolate glaze and white chocolate drizzle. - New Martha Stewart's Chocolate Chip Cookie Thins - Crisp cookies with caramelized edges, chewy centers, and semi-sweet chocolate chips. - New Coconut Layer Cake - A two-tier white cake with layers of vanilla mousse, topped with toasted coconut. - New Pumpkin Sheet Cake - A spiced pumpkin sheet cake topped with vanilla bean cream cheese frosting and a buttery brown sugar streusel. - New Mile-High Lemon Pie - Lemon filling in a shortbread crust, topped with whipped cream and a fresh lemon slice. - New Chocolate Tart Cookie - A chilled chocolate cookie crust filled with fudge and chocolate mousse, topped with whipped cream and dark chocolate curls. In addition to this week's limited-time menu, Crumbl continues to offer its Secret Menu, which features a limited-time cake or cookie selected by each location. You can check the Crumbl website and mobile app to see what's available near you. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    Panera Pours New Frozen Signature Hot Chocolate
    Panera debuts its new Frozen Signature Hot Chocolate and brings back its Signature Hot Chocolate for the 2025 holiday season. Both beverages are available now exclusively for MyPanera rewards members ahead of nationwide availability on November 5, 2025. Panera's Frozen Signature Hot Chocolate features half & half blended with a bittersweet chocolate sauce and ice, topped with whipped cream. In comparison, the chain's Signature Hot Chocolate features steamed milk with the same chocolate sauce, topped with whipped cream. To kick off the holiday season, on November 5, 2025, Panera will be giving a free Hot Chocolate Plush Keychain to the first 25 in-cafe (at the cashier) purchases of a Signature Hot Chocolate or Frozen Signature Hot Chocolate at participating locations. Photo via Panera. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

    Taco Bell is testing new Crispy Chicken Crunchwrap Sliders for a limited time at participating locations in the Knoxville, TN area. Featuring a snack-sized version of Taco Bell's signature Crunchwrap, each one comes filled with crispy-fried chicken nuggets, a three-cheese blend, pico de gallo, and a choice of Creamy Chipotle or new Sriracha Chile Sauce.  Crispy Chicken Crunchwrap Sliders are priced at $2.49 each. Taco Bell has occasionally served up Crunchwrap Sliders since 2014. They were most recently offered in March of this year. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )
    Nissin Releases New Turkey Dinner and Pumpkin Pie Cup Noodles Flavors
    Nissin gets into the Thanksgiving spirit this year with the launch of its new Turkey Dinner and Pumpkin Pie Cup Noodles flavors. The company describes the new flavors as a "moist" solution to the problems of "overcooked turkey, parched pumpkin pie crusts, or dry conversations." Turkey Dinner Cup Noodles features "rich essence of herb-seasoned turkey broth with sweet corn, tangy cranberry bursts, crisp green beans, warming spices, and tender noodles," while Pumpkin Pie offers a "satisfying pumpkin flavor blended with caramelized brown sugar sweetness and signature pie spices." The two new seasonal varieties mark the latest in a line of unexpected flavors from Cup Noodles. Others have included Dill Pickle, Campfire S'mores, Everything Bagel, and more. Turkey Dinner and Pumpkin Pie Cup Noodles are available now for a limited time exclusively at Walmart stores and the Walmart website. They're priced at $1.18 per cup. Photo via Nissin. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )

  • Open

  • Open

    Carl's Jr. Tests New Tri-Tip Burger
    Carl's Jr. is testing a new Tri-Tip Burger at participating locations in the Denver area. The new burger features a charbroiled beef patty, sliced sirloin tri-tip, grilled onions, bistro steak sauce, and a slice of Swiss cheese, served on a toasted brioche bun. Double (two beef patties and two slices of Swiss cheese) and Triple (three patties and three slices of cheese) versions are also available. The Tri-Tip is definitely on the premium end of the pricing spectrum, starting at $9.99 for the Single version (compared to $6.49 for a Single Famous Star). Photo via Carl's Jr. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )
    Chick-fil-A Opens New Beverage Cafe Concept
    Chick-fil-A, under its Red Wagon Ventures subsidiary, has opened a new beverage cafe concept called "Daybright Coffee and Refreshment," featuring a "vibrant mix of crafted beverages and delightful bites that are made in-house daily." The new cafe features both a dining room and dual drive-thru lanes and is open Monday through Saturday, from 6AM to 9PM. It is located at 4326 Jimmy Lee Smith Parkway in Hiram, GA.  The Daybright menu includes: Coffee, including cold brew, protein coffees, and lattes with add-ons like cold foam and syrup. Iced teas and lemonades. Fizzes - Sparkling beverages made with fruit juices.  Smoothies Bright Pressed Juices - Cold-pressed bottled juice blends. Daily Donuts - Baked fresh daily with olive oil.  Portable food, including a warm sandwich, stuffed English muffins, a breakfast burrito, egg bites, and a chocolate pull-apart.  A kid’s menu that includes a PB&J, egg bites, and smoothies. The new concept follows on the heels of McDonald's recently shuttered CosMcs cafe concept and Taco Bell's expanding Live Mas Cafe. Photo via Chick-fil-A. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )
    Shake Shack Offers $1 Soda, $3 Fries, and $5 Shakes
    Shake Shack offers a promotion where you can get soda for $1, classic crinkle-cut fries for $3, and regular menu shakes for $5 for a limited time. The deal is available when ordering through the Shake Shack website or mobile app. It specifically does not include limited-time shake flavors. Regular menu shake flavors include Vanilla, Chocolate, Strawberry, Cookies and Cream, Coffee, Black & White, and Chocolate & Vanilla. Photo via Shake Shack. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )
    Zaxbys Launches New Asian Zensation Menu
    Expanding on the popularity of its Asian Zensation Zalad (which was made a permanent menu item last year), Zaxbys launches its limited-time Asian Zensation menu, featuring the new Giant Asian Zensation Chicken Finger Wrap and Sweet Asian Glazed Chicken Finger Plate. The new Giant Asian Zensation Wrap basically takes the Asian Zensation Salad and wraps it up in a warm flour tortilla, i.e., it's a wrap that contains chopped hand-breaded Fried Chicken Fingerz or grilled chicken, mixed greens, carrots, red cabbage, wonton strips, Asian Slaw, and a drizzle of Teriyaki Sauce. The wrap comes with Crinkle Fries and a small drink. The new Sweet Asian Glazed Chicken Finger Plate includes four, five, or six Chicken Fingerz tossed in a Sweet Asian Glaze, served with coleslaw, Texas toast, Crinkle Fries, and a small drink. While they don't launch nationally until Monday, November 3, 2025, the new menu items are available now when ordering through the Zaxbys website and mobile app, as well as through third-party delivery platforms. Additionally, the chain will be adding a new Cookie Butter Milkshake to the menu. Zaxbys' first-ever holiday shake features a vanilla shake blended with cinnamon-spiced syrup and cookie pieces, topped with whipped cream, cookie crumbles, and a maraschino cherry. Photo via Zaxbys. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )

    2025 Halloween Deals and Specials
    Halloween is almost here, so here's a list of 2025 Halloween deals and specials to help celebrate the spooky holiday: - Auntie Anne's - The soft pretzel chain has limited-edition "Twist or Treat" Halloween Buckets available through November 2, 2025. Through October 31, purchasing a Halloween Bucket earns you a $5 Reward for your next visit.  - Baskin-Robbins - Through October 31, Baskin-Robbins Rewards members get 20% off the purchase of a Polar Pizza, plus 31% off all scoops on Halloween.
